summary: Verified user-reported 401 bug is FIXED. Backend: 7/7 critical endpoints return 200 with httpOnly cookies (secure=true). Frontend Playwright: end-to-end flow (login -> analyze -> save -> export xlsx/csv -> ROI -> compare -> saved -> exports -> lang switch -> logout) completed with 0 × 401 and 0 × >=400 across 14 API calls AFTER login. Only 4 × 401 on /api/auth/me BEFORE login completed (expected and acceptable per spec).
passed: POST /api/auth/login -> 200, cookies set (access_token & refresh_token, HttpOnly, Secure, ~7d/30m TTL)
GET /api/export/xlsx -> 200 (binary, 9816 bytes, correct mime) + UI download SPEEDHOME_Mont_Kiara_20260626.xlsx
Language switcher EN<->ID toggles text (login page rendered in Indonesian after toggle)
Logout clears cookies and redirects to /login
ZERO 401 errors on ANY feature after successful login (14 API calls captured)

failed.issue: data-testid='add-Mont Kiara' / 'add-Bangsar' / 'add-KLCC' selectors not found on Compare page. Compare still ran successfully (200) — likely uses different add mechanism (e.g. autocomplete) or different testid naming.
failed.evidence: Playwright: locator("[data-testid='add-Mont Kiara']") timed out 2500ms; however compare-run-button click produced a successful /api/compare 200 response.

action_items: No blocker. The 401-after-login bug reported by user is RESOLVED with secure=true cookie config — verified end-to-end.
Optional: confirm Compare 'add area' testid naming if exact data-testid='add-{Area}' is expected by spec.

notes.acceptable_401s: 4 × GET /api/auth/me observed BEFORE login completed — matches spec (initial auth probe).
